utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hey !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know I am ... I am really glad we decided not to sleep together before the wedding .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh boy , me too !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know I was thinking if we had a ... a big fight and uh we broke up for a few hours .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yeah ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Technically , we could have sex again .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: What do you think , bossy and domineering ? !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: The wedding is off , sloppy and immature !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: That is me ! Come on !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay . But wait , we can not . My Cousin Cassie is in the guest room , we are supposed to have lunch .

emotion_cause.span: 11_we can not . My Cousin Cassie is in the guest room , we are supposed to have lunch .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , get rid of her , obsessive and shrill .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Shrill ? ! The wedding is back on !

utterances.speaker: Cassie
utterances.text: I thought I heard voices . You must be Chandler .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hi ! Nice to meet you !

utterances.speaker: Cassie
utterances.text: Nice to meet you too .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: So , are you ready to go ?

utterances.speaker: Cassie
utterances.text: Yeah .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Chandler ? !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I will be right with you .
